title: DD INDIGENOUSE GAMES & CULTURAL FESTIVAL 2026
content:
4954/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 21st March, 2026 :DD Indigenouse Games & Cultural Festival 2026 chu vawiin khan a hmawr bawk a ni.

Doordarshan Aizawl leh Mizoram Indigenouse Association General Headquarters Aizawl te tang kawp buatsaih Mizo infiamna hrang hrang hmanga in el na hun ah hian Infiamna chi hrang hrang 9, Insuknawr, Inbuan, Insuknawr Tangho, Invawr, Kawikah, Inarpasual, kalchhet kal tangho, insaihruipawh leh Kalchhet kal mimal te hmang a inelna neih a ni a, Mizo Infiamna te tihmasawn tur leh chawisang turin vawi eng emaw Mizo Infiamna kut an lo buatsaih tawh thin a ni.

Doordarshan Indigenouse Games & Cultural Festival 2026 ah hian Infiamna chi hrang hrang 9, Insuknawr, Inbuan, Insuknawr Tangho, Invawr, Kawikah, Inarpasual, kalchhet kal tangho, insaihruipawh leh Kalchhet kal mimal te hmang a inelna neih a ni a, dinfiam mi 352 tel in heng zing a 126 chu hmeichhia niin, mipa 226 an tel a. Aizawl huam chhung veng 13 bakah Aizawl pawn khua 12 leh India ram pawn Polan atangin infiam mi 1 a tel bawk.

title: Thenzawlah World Forestry Day hmang
content:
4952/2025-2026Dated Serchhip, the 21st March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Thenzawl DFO Dr R Lalnungrenga hovin JNV Thenzawlah World Forestry Day hman a ni.

International Day of Forests (World Forestry Day) hi kum tin March ni 21-ah hman thin a ni a. Kumin pawh hian Thenzawl Forest Division hnuai ah he ni hi JNV Thenzawl ah hman niin, Thenzawl Forest Division staff leh JNV school naupangte leh faculty ten he hun hi an hmang.

Thenzawl DFO Dr R. Lalnungrenga chuan thusawiin kan chhehvela Pathian thilsiamte nena inrem taka awm ho dan kan zir a tul thu te, tui thianghlim in tur kan neih reng theih nan kan ramngaw te kan venhim a tul zia zirtir na te a nei a. He kan ram hi mihringte chauh chenna tura Pathian siam a ni lo a, inngeih tlang taka thilsiam dangte nena chengho tura siam kan ni, a ti.

Thenzawl RO Pu Zirtluanga Hnamte pawhin thu sawiin kumin World Forestry Day thupui “Forests and Economics” a nih ang takin kan ramngaw hi kan economy tithangtu atan i hmang ang u, a ti a. JNV Principal Pu Anish P pawhin environment humhalh a pawimawhzia a sawi a ni.
